operations.summary: Create a zone pattern entry in a specific zone
operations.notes: Create a zone pattern entry in a specific zone by identifier. The Zone ID listed in the API call will always override the Zone ID in the DTO if there is a mismatch in the Zone ID

parameters.name: zone_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the zone containing the zone pattern entry.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The zone pattern entry to create.

responseMessages.message: The zone pattern entry was created successfully.
User is not permitted to access the specified domain
Some of pattern entry parameters were invalid or missing
A zone with the specified identifier was not found.

operations.summary: Get all pattern entries for specific zones
operations.notes: Get the list of zone pattern entries for specific zones by identifiers

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Filter by IDs for the pattern entry results.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Filter by pattern string for the zone entry results.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by zone name for the pattern entry results.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Filter by comment for the pattern entry results.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Starting page number for query results.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of pages to return for the query, starting from the specified starting page.

parameters.name: children
parameters.description: Include child zones in the results.

responseMessages.message: The zone pattern entries were successfully retrieved.
User is not permitted to access the specified domain
A zone with the specified ID was not found.

operations.summary: Get a specific zone pattern entry for a specific zone
operations.notes: Get a specific zone pattern entry for a specific zone by identifier

parameters.name: zone_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the zone containing the zone entry.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifier of the zone pattern entry.

responseMessages.message: The zone pattern entry was successfully retrieved.
User is not permitted to access the specified domain
A zone with the specified identifier was not found.
A zone pattern entry with the specified identifier was not found.

type.description: Entry type. Currently only "security_group_by_name" is supported

pattern.description: Pattern to find security group by name

new_zone_id.description: New zone identifier to migrate the entry into

start.description: Start element index, started from zero
